themes.label: Mermaid Default
themes.note: sentinel: disables overlay, shows native Mermaid look

cdnIndependence.fallback: all palettes transcribed into local demo/const/themes.js; derived colors computed in JS and applied as inline CSS custom properties; no runtime fetch of beautiful-mermaid. Default theme needs no network.

integration.approach: page-level CSS overlay on normalized Mermaid SVG (#mermaid-svg)
integration.derivation: derived colors (--m-text/--m-line/--m-surface/--m-border/...) computed in JS via sRGB channel interpolation, weights aligned to theme.ts MIX; applied as inline custom properties on <html data-theme>
integration.scopedTo: document.documentElement data-theme attribute themes editor preview and examples gallery simultaneously

coverage.knownLimitation: some relationship-arrowhead rules in classDiagram/erDiagram use !important in Mermaid's embedded style and are not overridden by the overlay; relationship lines themselves are themed.

build.overlayBundled: selector [data-theme] #mermaid-svg and var(--m-surface)/var(--m-text) present in built assets/index-*.css

paletteFidelityCheck.method: byte-for-byte compare demo/const/themes.js THEMES vs references/beautiful-mermaid/src/theme.ts at pinned commit

paletteSwitchProbe.method: Playwright against built demo/dist served over local static http; render flowchart and read getComputedStyle across theme switches. SVG DOM/computed-color oracle only; no screenshots/canvas/image data (HG-3).

renderFlowIsolation.method: git show --name-only across theme commits 4805e65, ab1f96a, b7da3a6, 13efbf4

deferred.i18n: I18N Loop — theme button labels use hardcoded English marked with TODO(i18n-loop) comments
